Object.Name: ObstacleAvoidance
Object.Description1: This resource exposes the tif module ObstacleAvoidance of G4 mowers

Item.Name: Available
Item.Description: Available flag for the ObstacleAvoidance module. TifApp Equivalent: ObstacleAvoidance.GetAvailable() ObstacleAvoidance.SetAvailable(available:True)

Item.Name: Enabled
Item.Description: Enabled flag for the ObstacleAvoidance module. TifApp Equivalent: ObstacleAvoidance.GetEnabled() ObstacleAvoidance.SetEnabled(enabled:True)

Item.Name: UseAtBoundary
Item.Description: UseAtBoundary determines whether obstacle avoidance shall be done when close to boundary. TifApp Equivalent: ObstacleAvoidance.GetUseAtBoundary() ObstacleAvoidance.SetUseAtBoundary(useAtBoundary:True)
